sigWerErrors.reason: 'heceleyerek' means 'by spelling out' and 'hediyelere' means 'to the gifts'; this substitution completely changes the meaning of the sentence and makes it incoherent.
'edebilir' (can do) and 'edilebilir' (can be done) are different verb forms, but in this context, the meaning of the sentence is only slightly affected and remains understandable.
